twitter_thread: 27% app ranking boost: tested Jokitsien's review bot with 500 reviews, 200 from paid users.
No coding required: Jokitsien auto-posted reviews on Google Play and Apple App Store in 2 weeks.
Cost comparison: Jokitsien was 30% cheaper than ReviewBotPro and 25% more efficient than AppReviewX.
Warning: Apple's review algorithm flags 40% of fake reviews. Don't risk penalties with Jokitsien.
Jokitsien integrates with Google Analytics, AppFigures, and 3 other major app analytics tools.
3-month test: Jokitsien-driven reviews increased our app's 4-star ratings from 20% to 40%.
What's your experience with app review bots like Jokitsien? #appmarketing #reviews
